title: Bigger/Brighter Sun & Moon
description: This Texture Pack adds round Bigger Brighter sun and Moon.
body:
• Bigger/Brighter Sun & Moon is a clean, high‑visibility texture pack for Minecraft 1.21.11 that upgrades the sun and moon to larger brighter assets with clear lunar phases. The result is a more dramatic sky without
breaking the vanilla aesthetic, improving readability at a glance while keeping the world’s look cohesive.
